metadata.title: Heroes - Crisis Response & Missing Persons Locator
metadata.description: A resilient and optimized platform designed for crisis situations to facilitate the locating of unaccounted individuals, maximizing local persistence, battery efficiency, and secure coordination between families and rescuers.

onboarding.hintText: You can continue without creating an account, but to suggest modifications or update statuses, you must log in first.
onboarding.optionalNote: These demographic parameters are completely optional. They assist rescue operations in matching structural identification lists faster during field operations.

errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
